creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Patch tested and approved.

Joe:  Pull requests are more trouble than they're worth in this arena.  These are all work-in-progress ports, so there's nothing release-quality to protect and we're pretty casual about it.  If you'd rather not break someone else's port, just make a copy under a different name until you've tested your ideas.  Send me your Github ID and I'll add you to the developers group.
